rationale: Elec. Code §273.062 governs procedural rules for mandamus writ proceedings and has no substantive relation to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: A proceeding to obtain a writ of mandamus under this subchapter shall be conducted in accordance with the rules pertaining to original proceedings of the court in which the petition is filed.
_note: Rule concerns elections mandamus procedure only; no overlap with Tax Code homestead exemption provisions.
